title: Bulbophyllum jainii
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum jainii is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, Bulbophyllum jainii is classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Dendrobieae. This specific classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and morphological features.
